hooks.command: bash -c "FILE=$(echo \"$TOOL_INPUT\" | grep -oP '\"file_path\":\s*\"\K[^\"]+' || echo \"$TOOL_INPUT\" | grep -oP '\"filePath\":\s*\"\K[^\"]+' || echo ''); [[ \"$FILE\" =~ (\.env|\.db$|credentials|secrets\.|\.key$) ]] && echo 'BLOCK: Cannot edit sensitive files (.env, .db, credentials, secrets, .key)' && exit 1 || exit 0"

bash -c "FILE=$(echo \"$TOOL_INPUT\" | grep -oP '\"file_path\":\s*\"\K[^\"]+' || echo \"$TOOL_INPUT\" | grep -oP '\"filePath\":\s*\"\K[^\"]+' || echo ''); [[ \"$FILE\" =~ \\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx|json|css|md)$ ]] && npx prettier --write \"$FILE\" 2>/dev/null; exit 0"
